patch_name: Into the Fray Patch 4 / Arcane and Frost Patch
description: Major overhaul of Arcane and Frost Staffs, Black Zone loot changes, UI improvements, and extensive combat balance updates.

sections.heading: Major Features
items: Completed Magic Staff overhaul with Arcane and Frost Staff reworks (new abilities, visuals, animations)
Season 15 winner statue added for Elevate in Conquerors' Hall (with Team Pilas and RAQ banners)
sections.searchable_text: arcane frost overhaul season 15 statue elevate conquerors hall

sections.heading: UI & Quality-of-Life Improvements
items: Building Nutrition UI updated with clearer values and added nutrition display
Trade UI redesigned with visible Silver bids from both players
sections.searchable_text: ui qol building nutrition trade silver

sections.heading: Black Zone Loot Changes
items: First 90 seconds after a kill restrict loot access to allies, killer, and top damage dealer (and their allies)
After 90 seconds, loot becomes available to all players
sections.searchable_text: black zone loot restriction timer allies killer damage

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Might rewards from castles/outposts distributed in larger radius
Power Cores and Energy Crystals reward Might to contributors and nearby guild members
Character stats window now allows direct whisper/mail
Open-world furniture must be placed at least 10m apart (exceptions apply)
Faction Warfare Last Stand no longer blocks Journey Back
Faction Warfare Flagging Bonus can no longer be purged
Level 6+ Crystal League Championship tokens removed from Marketplace
sections.searchable_text: might rewards furniture placement faction warfare journey back crystal tokens

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: arcane rework chain missile enigma blade mimic

changes.raw_text: Cooldown: 5s → 6s; now grants forced movement immunity and loses shield when blocking it
New Q ability with chaining damage and Arcane Charge mechanic
notes: Applies Arcane Charges consumed for bonus damage
Now reduces resistances instead of defensive bonus

changes.raw_text: New W combo ability with damage cone and teleport follow-up

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: frostbite frozen surge frost lance glacial obelisk

changes.raw_text: New Q ability with stacking damage buff
New Q ability creating damaging slowing path
New W ability dealing AoE damage and reducing resistances
New W ability buffing allies and slowing enemies
Reworked root ability with combo system and capped solo root duration
notes: Root duration limited vs single targets

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Party UI sorting and highlighting improvements
Fixed Territory UI not closing on attack
Fixed item loss in guild vault transfers
Fixed Guild Rights UI lag
Fixed crest cooldown display issue
Royal Shoes now grant knockback immunity correctly
Harvester Workboots speed buff ends when mounted
Throwing Blades now damage mounts
Fixed incorrect cooldowns when swapping spells
Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes ui spells guild vault cooldown bugs
